input.command: curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/contents/128/color" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); print('\n'.join([f['name'].replace('.png', '') for f in files[:50] if f['name'].endswith('.png')]))"
